headline: Fed meeting minutes to show 'family fight' over rates. The squabble could drag on for a while
summary: There have been few instances over the past 35 years or so when the Fed has only made one rate move, be it up or down.

headline: CME Group (CME) Launches Beef Trim Futures, Is The Stock Still 20% Undervalued?
summary: CME Group (CME) has moved back into focus after announcing plans to launch new Beef Trim futures and options contracts, giving agriculture customers more precise tools to manage ground beef price risk. See our latest analysis for CME Group. The recent Beef Trim contracts come on top of CME Group’s broader product expansion, including plans for Single Stock futures. They arrive after a mixed stretch for the stock, with the share price rising 2.55% over one day and 9.02% over seven days but...

headline: Is CME Group’s (CME) Single Stock Futures Push Reframing Its Core Derivatives Growth Story?
summary: In late June 2026, CME Group announced plans to launch 90% and 50% Lean Beef Trim futures and options, alongside Single Stock futures on more than 50 leading U.S. equities, all pending regulatory approval. These new contracts extend CME Group’s reach deeper into both agricultural hedging and single‑name equity trading, highlighting how product innovation can reshape risk management for everyone from beef processors to active traders. We’ll now examine how CME Group’s push into Single Stock...

headline: CME Group (CME) Stock Looks Pricey Despite Its 50% Three Year Run
summary: CME Group stock sits in an interesting spot for valuation-focused investors right now, with a strong 50.2% return over the past three years set against signals that suggest the shares are roughly in line with the intrinsic value estimate from the Excess Returns model while trading at a premium on earnings-based multiples. Over the last three years CME Group has returned 50.2%, which means anyone looking at the stock today is assessing a business that has already delivered sizeable gains over...
